title: Physical Computing Explorer
description: Students will *identify* (Bloom L1: Remember) the three layers of a physical computing system — inputs, processor, and outputs — and *explain* (Bloom L2: Understand) how information flows through the sense → decide → act loop.
creator: Dan McCreary STEM Robots
subject: Robotics
Physical Computing
Computational Thinking
MicroPython
chapter_title: Introduction to Computational Thinking and Physical Computing

learningObjectives: Students will *identify* (Bloom L1: Remember) the three layers of a physical computing system — inputs, processor, and outputs — and *explain* (Bloom L2: Understand) how information flows through the sense → decide → act loop.
educational.prerequisites: Basic familiarity with the robot platform and MicroPython introduced earlier in the course.

pedagogical.interactionPattern: Interactive p5.js exploration with immediate visual feedback
pedagogical.rationale: Manipulating the model and seeing the result immediately helps students build an accurate mental model before working with the physical robot.
pedagogical.assessment: Use the discussion questions in the lesson plan to check for understanding.
